_comment: Reviewed, documented NON-CORE / baked exceptions for the P1a WU5 core-literal sweep (check-core-literals.mjs). Every entry is an explicit WU0 §1A out-of-core surface, NOT a themeable-core token. Adding here requires review.
_styles_css_hljs_syntax_theme: styles.css @layer components .hljs-* code-syntax highlight palette (WU0 §1A: syntax theme, not core storefront palette).
_styles_css_print_reset: styles.css @media print forces #fff/#000 (WU0 §1A: print-only reset, not a runtime themeable surface).
_index_html_theme_color_meta: index.html <meta name=theme-color> browser-chrome hints (#f8fafc light / #0f172a dark). The browser reads these at parse time; they CANNOT be CSS-var driven, so they stay static. Out of the runtime themeable CSS surface.
